LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AND GIVEN THAT THE EVIDENCE THE PLAINTIFFS HAVE PRESENTED DOES NOT SHOW A LIKELIHOOD OF EXTENDING THEIR LEASE, THE BALANCE OF HARMS TIPS TOWARD DEFENDANTS.
